fields.title: Fix worker bd tool registration for agent spawn
fields.description: Agent spawn currently crashes before worker session startup with '(0 , _index.createBdToolDefinition) is not a function'. Root cause appears to be extensions/tau/src/agent/worker.ts importing a named export that beads/index.ts does not provide. Add a real createBdToolDefinition export, cover worker custom tools with a regression test, and verify agent spawns again.
fields.notes: Verification: new worker custom-tools regression test passes, and worker-model-resolution tests still pass. Full typecheck/gate remains blocked by unrelated local untracked tests already present in this checkout: test/nudge.test.ts is missing AgentMessage timestamps, and test/worker-resource-loader.test.ts imports createWorkerResourceLoader which worker.ts does not export.
fields.close_reason: Exported real worker tool factories for bd and exa, added a regression test for createWorkerCustomTools, and verified the worker tool set builds again. Remaining gate failures in this checkout come from unrelated untracked tests.
